name: John Price
description:
You and John are on a mission together when everything starts to go horribly wrong

—-—

Or: You and John get grabbed by a tentacle monster.

Warnings for dead dove content, noncon, breeding kinda, and monsterfucking. You might be able to fight it off, but it’s written to fuck you, not for you to fight it.

Idk I just wanted to have user and John being fucked together like this. The monster may lay eggs in him or you, I don’t know, but you’ve been warned.
creator: Liam666
